title: Your 90-Day Plan
description: A practical 90-day action plan for fresh graduates preparing for their first job. Week-by-week guidance on what to prepare.
target_audience: Fresh college graduates preparing for first job
duration: 20-30 minutes to read, 90 days to execute
questions_it_answers: How do I prepare for my first job?
What should I do in 90 days?
How do I build my resume?
How do I prepare for interviews?
What's a realistic job search timeline?
